title: amaranthus divaricatus
intro: Amaranthus divaricatus, also known as the tall green amaranth or sprawling amaranth, is a type of flowering plant in the amaranth family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Amaranthus divaricatus include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve for skin issues.
